title: Sustainable Aviation Fuel Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q4 2025
content:
Global SAF Production Projected to Reach 158 Million Gallons in Q3 2025

Global SAF production is estimated to reach 158 million gallons in Q3 2025, driven by EU and UK mandate-driven demand and APAC production expansion. But North America faces an inflection point, with reduced 45Z credits likely slowing growth, due to project delays/cancellations, and a shift to lower-risk RD production. Commercial offtakes and supply deals support baseline demand. Extended partnerships like Nesteâ€“United, along with national procurement platforms such as SAFCo, provide the demand-side strength needed to stabilise long-term offtake.
author: Sanyam Malik
